Package org.rodinp.core

Interface IAttributeType

All Known Subinterfaces:
IAttributeType.Boolean, IAttributeType.Handle, IAttributeType.Integer, IAttributeType.Long, IAttributeType.String
All Known Implementing Classes:
AttributeType, AttributeType.Boolean, AttributeType.Handle, AttributeType.Integer, AttributeType.Long, AttributeType.String
public interface IAttributeType
Common protocol for all attribute types contributed by clients.

Attributes are attached to internal elements (that is elements that are stored in a file element) and provide non-structural information pertaining to that element (for instance the target of a refines clause).

Every attribute is associated with an attribute type, which contains the following information:

  • the id of the attribute type (which is unique),
  • the human-readable name of the attribute type,
  • the kind of the attribute, that is the Java type of the associated attribute values.
The correspondence between attribute values and kinds is the following:
  • boolean: IAttributeType.Boolean
  • IRodinElement: IAttributeType.Handle
  • int: IAttributeType.Integer
  • long: IAttributeType.Long
  • String: IAttributeType.String

Attribute type instances are guaranteed to be unique. Hence, two attribute types can be compared directly using identity (==). Instances can be obtained using the static factory methods from RodinCore.

Moreover, this interface provides a protocol to retrieve and check the relationships existing between attribute and element types.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • RodinCore.getAttributeType(java.lang.String)
  • RodinCore.getBooleanAttrType(java.lang.String)
  • RodinCore.getHandleAttrType(java.lang.String)
  • RodinCore.getIntegerAttrType(java.lang.String)
  • RodinCore.getLongAttrType(java.lang.String)
  • RodinCore.getStringAttrType(java.lang.String)

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    IAttributeType.Boolean
    Common protocol for attribute types corresponding to attributes that carry a boolean value.
    static interface 
    IAttributeType.Handle
    Common protocol for attribute types corresponding to attributes that carry a Rodin element handle.
    static interface 
    IAttributeType.Integer
    Common protocol for attribute types corresponding to attributes that carry an int value.
    static interface 
    IAttributeType.Long
    Common protocol for attribute types corresponding to attributes that carry a long value.
    static interface 
    IAttributeType.String
    Common protocol for attribute types corresponding to attributes that carry a string value.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IInternalElementType<?>[]
    getElementTypes()
    Returns the types of internal elements that can carry an attribute of this type.
    String
    getId()
    Returns the unique id of this attribute type.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the human-readable name of this attribute type.
    boolean
    isAttributeOf(IInternalElementType<?> elementType)
    Tells whether an attribute of this type can be carried by an element of the given type.
    boolean
    isUbiquitous()
    Returns whether this attribute type is ubiquitous.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      String getId()
      Returns the unique id of this attribute type.
      Returns:
      the id of this attribute type

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns the human-readable name of this attribute type.
      Returns:
      the name of this attribute type

    • getElementTypes

      IInternalElementType<?>[] getElementTypes()
      Returns the types of internal elements that can carry an attribute of this type.
      Returns:
      the types of element that can carry an attribute of this type
      Since:
      1.7

    • isAttributeOf

      boolean isAttributeOf(IInternalElementType<?> elementType)
      Tells whether an attribute of this type can be carried by an element of the given type.
      Parameters:
      elementType - an internal element type
      Returns:
      true iff an element of the given type can carry an attribute of this type
      Since:
      1.7

    • isUbiquitous

      boolean isUbiquitous()
      Returns whether this attribute type is ubiquitous.

      Ubiquitous element types can have any parent type.

      Returns:
      true if ubiquitous, false otherwise
      Since:
      1.7
